name: vendy-print-server
description: Micro-servicio ESC/POS para impresión térmica nativa

scripts.build:win: pkg . --targets node20-win-x64 --compress GZip --output dist/vendy-print-server.exe && node patch-subsystem.js dist/vendy-print-server.exe
scripts.build:uninstaller: pkg uninstaller.js --targets node20-win-x64 --compress GZip --output dist/VendyPrintServer-Uninstaller.exe && node patch-subsystem.js dist/VendyPrintServer-Uninstaller.exe
scripts.build:all: npm run build:win && npm run build:uninstaller

author: Vendy
